questions.question: What is the primary advantage of cloud computing?
questions.explanation: Cloud computing offers improved scalability, enhanced control, and all of the above

questions.question: Which of the following is a characteristic of Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS)?
questions.explanation: Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) provides virtualization, server management, and software provision

questions.question: What is the main difference between Public Cloud and Private Cloud?
questions.explanation: The main difference between Public Cloud and Private Cloud is control and ownership

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of a Public Cloud Service?
questions.explanation: Amazon Web Services (AWS) is an example of a Public Cloud Service

questions.question: What is the term for the practice of maintaining multiple copies of data in different locations?
questions.explanation: Data replication is the term for maintaining multiple copies of data in different locations
